codeReview.summary: The implementation covers the requested scope: vitest/supertest/passport-google-oauth20 dependencies were added, package.json gained a test script, vitest.config.ts was created with aliases matching tsconfig intent, a passing smoke test was added, and .env.example includes all requested auth placeholders. No defects were found in the changed feature files.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill procedure is overly rigid for infrastructure-only tasks: it mandates RED/GREEN TDD and manual API endpoint checks even when the feature is dependency/config setup with no endpoint changes.

summary: Reviewed features.json metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 45ed4ed diff/stat. Result: pass, with no blocking or non-blocking code issues in the implementation, plus one shared-state observation about backend-worker skill applicability to infra features.
